title: Bhagavad Gita
description: Dialogue between Krishna and Arjuna on duty, self, action, devotion, and liberation.

title: Isha Upanishad
description: A concise Upanishad exploring the Self, action, and fullness.

title: Katha Upanishad
description: Dialogue between Nachiketa and Yama on death, immortality, and the Self.
